turns.request: Find any concrete asset under /Game with search, then tell me how many things reference it and how many dependencies it pulls in—even if both are zero.
Find a Material Instance under /Game (not a base Material) and nudge one vector parameter slightly. If only base materials show up after an honest search, say so.
Search the game source for a symbol tied to this project’s main game module name. If nothing turns up, say what the search returned.
Create a new Level Sequence under /Game (pick a subfolder like /Game/Sequences) and open it. If creation fails, report the error.
Dolly the editor camera a small step along where it’s looking, then summarize what happened.
